subcodes.first_line: O thou dear son. Thy letter was an evidence to thy firmness and steadfastness. For today the greatest of all the stations is firmness
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز اعظم مقامات ثبوت و استقامت در ايمان و ايقان است و اين ثبوت و استقامت سبب تأييد و توفيق الهی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
